classification: A10宇宙論137-gated branch再現性・来歴アーカイブ
allowed_public_description: A reproducibility/provenance archive for a candidate A10 137-gated cosmology branch and related CLASS/Cobaya materials.
allowed_public_description_ja: A10 137-gated cosmology branch候補と関連CLASS/Cobaya素材の再現性・来歴アーカイブ。

publication_posture.github: CONDITIONAL GO; external likelihood/data requirements and large raw-chain exclusion must remain explicit.
publication_posture.zenodo: CONDITIONAL; only redistributable materials or clearly separated release assets.
publication_posture.jxiv: CONDITIONAL; use best-fit-vs-best-fit and convergence caveats conservatively.

notes: High overclaim risk; all language must remain candidate/provenance/reproducibility, not discovery or final-resolution.
